calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing San Francisco Local Rule 6.Sc
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Mitchell L. Wong, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, PAL Depositor Trust-1, Private Academic Loans, LLC, and GCO Education Loan Funding Corp.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Jacob G. Docimo and Maryam Mashhoon,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $36,405.73
Pre-Judgment Interest: $21,455.44
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $660.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $58,521.17

Judgment signed in open court.
